data.title: Iranian Negotiator Resigns Amid Talks with U.S.
data.description: Iranian International Television reports that the head of Iran's delegation in negotiations with the United States in Islamabad, Kalibaf, has resigned and withdrawn from the talks. According to Odaily, this development coincided with a short-term increase in oil prices, with Brent and WTI crude rising by nearly $1. Brent is currently priced at $98.4 per barrel, while WTI stands at $100.07 per barrel.

data.title: STOCKS | KeyBanc Sets $325 Price Target for Amazon Ahead of Earnings Call
data.description: KeyBanc Capital Markets has set a price target of $325 for Amazon stock in anticipation of the company's earnings call on April 29. According to NS3.AI, Amazon shares were trading at $255, suggesting a potential upside of approximately 28% if the target is achieved.

data.title: Brazil's Inflation and Economic Growth Projections for 2026 and 2027
data.description: According to a Reuters survey, Brazil's inflation is expected to be 4.5% in 2026 and 3.9% in 2027, compared to January's forecast of 4.0% and 3.8%, respectively. The Brazilian economy is projected to grow by 1.8% in both 2026 and 2027, consistent with the January forecast of 1.8% for 2026 and a slight adjustment from 1.9% for 2027. Out of 35 economists surveyed, 31 anticipate that the Brazilian central bank will lower the key interest rate from 14.75% to 14.50% on April 29.

data.title: Kremlin Indicates Putin May Attend G20 Summit in Miami
data.description: The Kremlin has announced that Russian President Vladimir Putin might travel to Miami, USA, for the G20 Summit. According to Odaily, this potential visit marks a significant diplomatic engagement for Russia on the international stage.

data.title: South Africa Proposes New Capital Flow Management Regulations
data.description: South Africa's Treasury has released the draft of the 2026 Capital Flow Management Regulations for public consultation. According to PANews, the draft aims to restructure the current foreign exchange control framework under the Currency and Exchanges Act. Key proposals include aligning with the OECD and FATF recommendations on anti-money laundering, counter-terrorism financing, and curbing illicit financial flows. For the first time, crypto-assets will be included in the foreign exchange control scope to enhance risk management and regulation. The draft also clarifies exemptions, licensing, and applicable conditions, and introduces administrative penalties for violations. Feedback must be emailed to the National Treasury within 30 days of the announcement.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | International Gold Prices Driven by Uncertain Iran-U.S. Situation
data.description: International spot gold prices have experienced a rebound, driven by news of potential ceasefire talks. According to Jin10, despite the upward movement, the peak of the rebound continues to decline, indicating a lack of bullish confidence. The uncertain situation between Iran and the U.S. remains the biggest obstacle to a surge in bullish sentiment.

data.title: Iranian media reports that the head of the Iranian delegation negotiating with the United States in Islamabad, Ghalibaf, has resigned and withdrawn from the negotiating team.
data.description: According to Iran's International Television, the head of the Iranian delegation negotiating with the United States in Islamabad, Ghalibaf, has resigned and withdrawn from the negotiating team. WTI and Brent crude oil prices rose nearly $1 in the short term, currently trading at $98.4 per barrel and $100.07 per barrel respectively. (Jinshi)

data.title: Sources: Iran dropped more mines in the Strait of Hormuz earlier this week.
data.description: Sources say Iran dropped more mines in the Strait of Hormuz earlier this week. (Axios)

data.title: Whale Deposits TRUMP Tokens Ahead of Mar-a-Lago Luncheon
data.description:
A whale recently deposited 2.2 million TRUMP tokens on a centralized exchange (CEX), valued at $6.29 million, according to BlockBeats On-chain Detection. This transaction occurred three hours ago. The whale had purchased these tokens a month ago to attend a luncheon with U.S. President Donald Trump, incurring a loss of approximately $398,000.

President Trump is set to host a grand luncheon for TRUMP token holders tomorrow at Mar-a-Lago, where he will deliver a speech. He will be joined by 18 'superstars,' and the TRUMP token team has positioned the luncheon as a global cryptocurrency and business conference.

data.title: XRP/BTC Faces Potential 40.5% Decline After Breaking Key Support
data.description: XRP/BTC has closed below a crucial weekly descending triangle support, indicating a potential 40.5% decline towards 0.000011 BTC. According to NS3.AI, this technical setup suggests a bearish outlook for the pair. Meanwhile, SoSoValue data reveals that U.S.-based spot XRP ETFs have experienced nine consecutive days of net inflows, amounting to $73.78 million.

data.title: Canada's 2026 Core Inflation and GDP Growth Rates Expected to Remain Steady
data.description: Canada's core inflation rate and GDP growth rate for 2026 are projected to be 2.3% and 1.2%, respectively, according to a Reuters survey. This forecast aligns with the predictions made in January, indicating stability in the country's economic outlook.

data.title: Tempo's Transaction Rate Falls Short of Bitcoin's Amid Declining Activity
data.description: Tempo is currently processing approximately 2.5 transactions per second, which is lower than Bitcoin's average of around five transactions per second. According to NS3.AI, Tempo's mainnet was launched on March 18, and five weeks later, the platform reported approximately 5,600 daily active users. Additionally, Tempo disclosed $205 in 24-hour fees and a total value locked of $3 million. However, the platform has experienced significant declines in wallet numbers, transfer volumes, and decentralized exchange activity since reaching peaks in March.

data.title: A whale bought 2.2 million Trump shares a month before attending Trump's luncheon and is currently down $398,000.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale (CX2tAR...3ZuY) deposited 2.2 million TRUMP tokens, worth $6.29 million, into Binance three hours ago. This whale purchased the tokens a month ago to attend a luncheon hosted by Trump and is currently experiencing a loss of approximately $398,000.

data.title: Canada's February Retail Sales Growth Revised to 1.2%
data.description: Canada's retail sales for February showed a monthly growth rate of 0.7%, falling short of the anticipated 0.9%. According to Jin10, the previous month's figure was revised from 1.1% to 1.2%, indicating a stronger performance than initially reported.

data.title: U.S. Navy Intercepts 34 Vessels Amid Iranian Port Blockade
data.description: U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth announced that U.S. Navy warships have intercepted and redirected 34 commercial vessels following the White House's directive to blockade Iranian ports. According to NS3.AI, the Trump administration's objective is to prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons. U.S. President Donald Trump has yet to decide whether to achieve this goal through diplomatic means or a military strike.

data.title: Oil Prices Decline Amid Anticipated Iran-U.S. Talks
data.description:
A Pakistani government source has indicated that Iran's Foreign Minister, Araqchi, is expected to arrive in Islamabad with a small delegation on Friday evening. According to Odaily, discussions between Iran and the United States are likely to take place, leading to a rapid decrease in oil prices. Tamas Varga from oil brokerage firm PVM noted that while the fundamental backdrop remains favorable, traders are closing long positions ahead of an unpredictable weekend and will reassess their positions on Sunday evening based on developments in Iran.

Haitong Futures reported that if negotiations show no progress by the end of April and fighting resumes, oil prices could reach new highs this year. Susannah Streeter, Chief Investment Strategist at British investment service company Wealth Club, stated that with key transportation routes in the region still blocked, new economic challenges are anticipated, keeping commodity prices elevated.

data.title: Morgan Stanley launches stablecoin reserve fund compliant with the GENIUS Act.
data.description: Morgan Stanley Investment Management has launched a government money market fund called Stablecoin Reserves Portfolio (MSNXX) to provide stablecoin issuers with a reserve asset holding scheme that complies with the GENIUS Act. This fund is part of the Morgan Stanley Institutional Liquidity Fund Trust and primarily targets payment-type stablecoin issuers that require accredited investment instruments to support their token reserves. The fund maintains a stable net asset value of $1 by investing in cash, U.S. Treasury bills, notes, and bonds with remaining maturities of 93 days or less, and overnight repurchase agreements backed by U.S. Treasury securities. Amy Oldenburg, Head of Digital Asset Strategy at Morgan Stanley, stated that this move aims to modernize financial infrastructure and expand digital investment solutions for institutional clients. As of March 31, 2026, Morgan Stanley Investment Management and its affiliates have $1.9 trillion in assets under management.

data.title: Bitcoin Shows Clear Bullish Signal as Vector Framework Activates
data.description: Glassnode has announced that the Vector framework has triggered a clear bullish signal for Bitcoin. According to Foresight News, this development indicates potential positive momentum for the cryptocurrency. The Vector framework is a tool used to analyze market trends and signals, and its activation suggests a favorable outlook for Bitcoin's performance in the near future.

data.title: AI Industry in Early Stages of Rapid Evolution, Says NeoSoul Co-Founder
data.description:
The AI industry is still in the early stages of rapid evolution, according to NeoSoul co-founder Kaelan. Speaking at the Hong Kong Intelligent Crypto Finance Forum, Kaelan emphasized the importance of evaluating AI projects not only based on current products but also on the team's ability to adapt to changes in foundational model capabilities.

Kaelan highlighted that AI entrepreneurship requires both practical and visionary approaches. A practical approach involves having the engineering, product design, and market understanding to create tangible products. Meanwhile, a visionary approach involves building in alignment with the evolution of large models.

He noted that some early AI products may appear as toys, but in emerging industries, such experimental forms should be allowed. Many genuine new paradigms often first appear as experimental products.

data.title: Eni Group: Middle East Crisis Impact Exceeds Market Expectations
data.description: Italian oil company Eni Group has stated that the ongoing crisis in the Middle East is expected to have a more significant impact than the market currently anticipates. According to Jin10, the company emphasized the potential for disruptions in oil supply and heightened geopolitical tensions, which could lead to increased volatility in global energy markets. Eni Group's assessment highlights the need for careful monitoring of developments in the region, as the situation may affect oil prices and energy security worldwide.
